auth.createUser: INSERT INTO users ("user", email, phone, password) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4) RETURNING id, email, "user", phone;
auth.getUserByEmail: SELECT id, email, password, "user", phone FROM users WHERE email = $1 LIMIT 1;
auth.getUserByUser: SELECT id, email, password, "user", phone FROM users WHERE LOWER("user") = LOWER($1) LIMIT 1;
auth.getUserByPhone: SELECT id, email, password, "user", phone FROM users WHERE phone = $1 LIMIT 1;
auth.updateUserPasswordByEmail: UPDATE users SET password = $1 WHERE email = $2 RETURNING id, email, "user", phone;
auth.updateUserPasswordByUser: UPDATE users SET password = $1 WHERE LOWER("user") = LOWER($2) RETURNING id, email, "user", phone;
